title: [Feature request]  WebAuthn redirection
author: webabox
body_snippet:
Description: WebAuthn redirection allows WebAuthn requests to be redirected from a remote session to a local device, enabling secure, in-session passwordless authentication. This feature is crucial for improving security and user experience in remote desktop environments.

Benefits:

Enhanced security through passwordless authentication.
Improved user experience by leveraging existing authentication methods.
Compatibility with Windows Hello for Business and FIDO security keys like Yubikey.

Refe...

iterations.description: Bulk verified: commit f60d2ace exists (HIGH confidence)

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

**Commit:** `f60d2ace` (fork `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`)
**What changed:** Add RedirectWebAuthn and EnableRdsAadAuth boolean properties

A beta build (v1.81.0-beta.4) including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Ou...

notes:
AI triage (claude): Valid RDP WebAuthn/FIDO2 redirection feature request requiring two new boolean RDP file properties (redirectwebauthn:i:1, enablerdsaadauth:i:1) to be exposed in the RDP connection settings UI.
Approach: Add RedirectWebAuthn and EnableRdsAadAuth boolean properties to RDP connection options, wire them through ConnectionInfo serialization, and expose in the RDP protocol settings panel.
